decisions.series_shape: occasion.series = { label, rungs: [{ years, title, prompts? }] }; rung.prompts optional, falls back to occasion.prompts
decisions.series_scope: two ladders: child birthdays (per-rung prompts) + anniversaries (shared prompts)
decisions.anniversary_default_rungs: [1,5,10,15,20,25] not the literal 25 (author flagged, data-only reversible)
decisions.dates: wizard collects one anchor date; each rung openOn = anchor + years, editable per rung, rung removable
decisions.zip: N separate self-contained tessera-<ID>.zip downloads (no family-zip container) — author settled 2026-07-12
decisions.state: 'series' draft slot via setDraft/getDraft; NO migrate() bump
decisions.seal: loop existing TesseraExport.seal per rung in date order — one seal path preserved
decisions.print: add printKits(sealedList) to print.js (concat kitSheets -> show); presentation-only, not a format event

resume_hint: Start c1-data: add series design entry to docs/decisions.md, then add series data to data/occasions.js (new child-years occasion with per-rung prompts via /occasion; add series to existing anniversary occasion, shared prompts). Then c2..c5 in order.
